g.text: ("/guardian"; rose = planned. Approve is admin-only, ADR-005)
ADR-014 -- conditional now: only a cold entry
or a step-up crossing UP from kid mode reaches
adult<->adult navigation is free once warm
Apple if the flag is on)
until an admin approves the account (WS-J)
Add or edit a child's profile
NOT admin-only, unlike the approval gate below)
to the child it was for
(the review queue moved here from the guardian console)
pick the top of the queue
Shipped in the guardian console today
(request + assign + monitor; the console also has a
notification bell, a family reading-visibility page (/guardian/reading), and
(the ADR-005 approval gate; the admin console also holds the master library
(#277), user management, the authoring queue, the moderation dashboard/
thresholds, the provider allowlist, and the audit log -- see sitemap-and-flows),
ADR-014: one AdultGate at the root of the whole adult subtree (not a per-page
gate) is the single kid-to-adult boundary; step-up fires only crossing UP from
kid mode, never guardian<->guardian, guardian<->admin, or admin<->guardian.
See journey-kid for the child side, seq-device-grant for the device-grant
mechanics, and journey-dev-coverage for test coverage.
